title: Mass of Earth's Oceans
body: Estimate the total mass of Earth's oceans in kilograms. (Hint: use $$mass=density volume$$, and approximate the oceans as covering a sphere of diameter $$\pm {10}^7$$ $$m$$ with average depth $${10}^3\pm 3$$ $$m$$. Density of seawater ≈ $${10}^3$$ $$\frac{kg}{m^3}$$ .)
